codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the reported recovery-alignment failure: successful market-refresh recovery now clears stale failure flags in the shared runtime path before advancing cache revision, and diagnostics derives readiness/degraded state from the same recovered flags. Regression coverage exercises both the refresh-recovery path and recovered diagnostics state.

summary: Reviewed commit 84076b5 for runtime-recovery-state-alignment-fix, including transcript, handoff, related prior provider-resilience commits, implementation diff, and targeted tests. I found no blocking or non-blocking correctness issues; the fix aligns runtime recovery cleanup and diagnostics semantics with the feature requirements and prior scrutiny failure.
